About: It is about establishing and supporting a Jewish homeland through colonization in the region of Palestine.
It is about the creation of a Jewish state in Palestine.
It is about the repatriation of an indigenous people to the homeland of their ancestors.
It is about the belief that Jews constitute a nation and have a right and need for self-determination.
It is about the establishment of a Jewish demographic majority in Palestine.
